response: The March onboarding cohort reported a satisfaction score of 7.2/10, down from 8.1, with positives including the highly rated buddy system at 9.1/10 and timely IT support. Key issues include confusion among 5/8 participants about the benefits deadline, tools access delays of 3-5 days (versus a 1-day target), and lack of a received culture handbook, with the priority action to fix tools access.
